name: SANAM Live in Concert - Bengaluru
about: India's most cherished pop-rock group SANAM performs soulful renditions of classics like "Gulabi Aankhen," "Lag Ja Gale," and "Pehla Nasha" along with originals like "Hawa Banke." Part of their 10-city India tour. Featuring Sanam Puri (lead vocals), Samar Puri (lead guitar), Venky S (bass guitar), and Keshav Dhanraj (drums). Tickets from Rs 999 (General) to Rs 8,999+ (VVIP Meet & Greet).

address.streetAddress: Whitefield Main Road, Mahadevapura, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560048

name: Calvin Harris Live in Bengaluru
about: The GRAMMY Award-winning producer, DJ and songwriter Calvin Harris makes his long-awaited India debut! Known for era-defining hits like 'We Found Love', 'One Kiss', 'Summer', 'Feel So Close', and his latest single 'Blessings', Calvin Harris brings his unparalleled sound and spectacular visual production to India for the very first time. This is part of his three-city India Tour produced by Sunburn and BookMyShow Live. Expect a career-spanning setlist of massive anthems, soaring visuals and an unforgettable night of electronic music. With over 35 billion combined streams, this is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to witness the King of Dance Music live.

name: Anjunadeep Open Air Bengaluru // India Tour 2026
about: The London-based record label returns to Bengaluru with their signature open-air format at the JW Marriott golf resort. Lineup focuses on melodic house, progressive textures, and emotive, long-form performances. Featuring CRi, Eli & Fur, Nordfold, and Parallel Voices. Tickets from Rs 2,850. 21+ event.

location.name: JW Marriott Bengaluru Prestige Golfshire Resort & Spa

address.streetAddress: Nandi Hills Road Karahalli Post, Kundana Hobli, Devanahalli, Taluk, Bengaluru, Karnataka 562164, India

name: Oddball x THT present Jack Gardiner
about: UK guitarist Jack Gardiner performs in Bangalore as part of his first-ever India tour, celebrating the release of his debut album "Kintsugi". Acclaimed session guitarist described by Guitar World as "one seriously gifted guitar player." Jack has toured the world with Plini and Arch Echo, collaborated with Henrik Linder (Dirty Loops) and Cory Wong, and is an Ibanez endorsed artist known for his unique fusion style.

name: Chintan Kalra Live
about: Solo acoustic performance by indie artist Chintan Kalra at the intimate Art Khoj space in J.P. Nagar. Chintan Kalra is a pioneer of the Indian rock scene, known for his work with Parikrama and Think Floyd. Experience an evening of soulful acoustic music from one of India's most versatile musicians.

address.streetAddress: 31/2, 1st Floor, 22nd Main Rd, R.K Colony, Marenahalli, 2nd Phase, J. P. Nagar, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560078

name: Sitar for Mental Health by Rishab Rikhiram Sharma | India Tour 2026 | Bengaluru
about: The youngest and last disciple of Pandit Ravi Shankar presents an immersive concert blending sitar's ancient traditions with modern electronic elements. Features guided listening and reflective pauses, framing the experience as both musical and meditative. Kickoff show for a 10-city India tour. Outdoor, seated, wheelchair accessible. Tickets range from Rs 2,999 to Rs 29,999 across Silver, Gold, Platinum, and Diamond tiers.

address.streetAddress: Survey No - 147/15, near Embassy Riding School, Jala Hobali, Yelahanka, Tharahunise, Bengaluru, Karnataka 562157

name: Osho Jain Experience | Raag Mehfil
about: An intimate storytelling concert where Osho Jain revisits his compositions alongside personal anecdotes. Songs include "Dekha Hi Nahi," "Khush Toh Hai Na," and "Humara Ho Gaya." Indoor seated, kid-friendly. Gates open at 6:30 PM. Tickets range from Rs 499 (Gold) to Rs 8,999 (Meet & Greet).

name: UN40: Music & Beyond Festival (Day 2)
about: Day 2 of Saregama Live's UN40 multi-genre cultural festival. Two-day event blending music, comedy, creator meetups, gaming zones, and a European-style beer garden at NICE Grounds. Featuring massive performances by Himesh Reshammiya, Thaikkudam Bridge, Tony Kakkar, Raja Kumari, Flipperachi, Talwiinder, Shalmali Kholgade, Aditya Rikhari, Santosh Narayanan, Rashmeet Kaur, Paradox, NDS, Arjun Tanwar, Paal Dabba, Reble, Lashcurry, Maahi, Pragati Nagpal, and Kushagra. A festival aimed at the under-40 crowd with interactive team-based games, a comedy stage featuring Harsh Gujral, Inder Sahani, and Onkar Yadav, plus content creator meetups.

name: UN40: Music & Beyond Festival (Day 1)
about: Saregama Live's new multi-genre cultural festival for audiences under 40. Two-day event blending music, comedy, creator meetups, gaming zones, and a European-style beer garden. Features 20+ music acts across genres including Himesh Reshammiya, Thaikkudam Bridge, Tony Kakkar, Raja Kumari, Flipperachi (India live debut), Talwiinder, Shalmali Kholgade, Aditya Rikhari, Santosh Narayanan, Rashmeet Kaur, Paradox, NDS, Arjun Tanwar, Paal Dabba, Reble, Lashcurry, Maahi, Pragati Nagpal, and Kushagra. Plus comedy acts by Harsh Gujral, Inder Sahani, and Onkar Yadav. Interactive gaming zone with team-based challenges and a European-style beer garden with creator meetups and informal performances.

name: Der Sandman & Namascoyote
about: Underground party at Pebble featuring Der Sandman and Namascoyote. Presented by Madvibes.

address.streetAddress: Gate number 9, Princess Academy, Palace Grounds 3, Ramana Maharishi Road, Bellary Rd, Jayamahal, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560080
